data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the ability to simulate and compare multiple strategies, as outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not provide concrete details or metrics regarding the simulation and comparison of strategies, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The lack of specific evidence demonstrating how the system simulates and compares the generated plans indicates a gap in fulfilling this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of simulation and comparison of multiple strategies.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
